reference: Hello, I really appreciate your concern. There are several conditions that could be causing the symptoms you have described. The first is a stone condition of the urethra, urethritis, an infection, or referred pain. For the right diagnosis, it needs to be differentiated. Until then, diclofenac can be tried. I hope this information helps.
